title: iPad
lead: Cachly runs on iPad with the same interface as on iPhone, taking advantage of the larger screen — and works alongside other apps with iPadOS multitasking.

sections.heading: iPad
sections.text: On iPad, Cachly gives you all the same features as on iPhone, with the larger screen giving the map, lists and cache details more room to work. It also supports iPadOS multitasking — Split View and Slide Over — so you can run Cachly beside another app such as Safari or Notes. 🖥 With iCloud sync on, lists and data you set up on iPad are ready on your iPhone in the field.

sections.heading: Everything Else Is the Same
sections.text: The capabilities described throughout this guide — the map , logging , search , offline maps and more — are all present on iPad, just laid out for the larger display.
